title: [policy] Replay protection compliance
description: Policy: spec/02-physical-link.md §4.4. MUST: (1) Epoch advances on reboot, (2) Epoch init random [128,255] without persistence, (3) Receivers reject epoch < LastEpoch, (4) SeqNum window for out-of-order. When executing: grep for epoch/seqnum handling in all implementations, create compliance bead per code section.
